mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.parent_id AS parentId, m.menu_name AS menuName, m.menu_type AS menuType, m.path, m.component, m.icon, m.permission_code AS permissionCode, m.sort, m.visible, m.status, m.created_at AS createdAt, m.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND m.status = 'ENABLED' AND m.visible = 1 ORDER BY m.sort

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id AS parentId, m.menu_name AS menuName, m.menu_type AS menuType, m.path, m.component, m.icon, m.permission_code AS permissionCode, m.sort, m.visible, m.status, m.created_at AS createdAt, m.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 'ENABLED' AND m.visible = 1 ORDER BY m.sort

SELECT id, parent_id AS parentId, menu_name AS menuName, menu_type AS menuType, path, component, icon, permission_code AS permissionCode, sort, visible, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM sys_menu WHERE status = 'ENABLED' ORDER BY sort
